element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation for all combat throughout game
Supplementary to melee; ammunition scarcity enforces melee focus
Unlocked through level progression; escalates damage output
Resource management; found on corpses or scattered
Visual communication of enemy strength hierarchy
Narrative explanation for Konoko's combat prowess

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing enemy groups in open exploration areas
typical_tension_triggers: Color-coded enemy encounters (escalation: green → blue → red)
Large multi-enemy encounters in open spaces
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation with increasing enemy tier complexity; melee-focused combat rhythm punctuated by weapon discoveries and story revelations

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Large building interiors designed by hired architects; open exploration areas of varying sizes encourage thoroughness

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundation building with basic melee and weak (green-tier) enemies; introduces core combat mechanics safely
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression unlocks stronger combos and introduces mid-tier (blue) enemies; weapon variety expands; power-ups become tactical considerations
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-tier (red) enemies dominant; late-game weapons (rocket launchers, energy weapons) available; climactic plot stakes escalate with Syndicate threat
notable_spikes: Climactic level with Syndicate/TCTF confrontation and Atmospheric Conversion Center plot

notable_level_patterns.description: Some of the fourteen levels are entire buildings designed by hired architects; players navigate multi-room spaces with full open exploration
Enemies subdivided into tiers (green/blue/red) with color-coded health indicators; progression mirrors Marathon-style difficulty signaling
Levels do not confine combat to small arenas; each area is fully open to explore, allowing varied approach angles and dynamic multi-enemy encounters
Ammunition is scarce; hand-to-hand combat is most effective and common despite availability of ten different guns
